entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agriculture and human populations

entities.name: WOMEN
entities.description: Female human beings, specifically those involved in farming and resource management

entities.name: GENDER EQUALITY
entities.description: The state in which access to rights or opportunities is unaffected by gender

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices designed to withstand and recover from climate-related shocks

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Materials or substances such as water, soil, and forests used for survival and production

entities.name: GENDER AND SOCIAL NORMS
entities.description: Informal rules and expectations that govern behavior based on gender and social status

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL CLIMATE ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting agricultural practices to minimize the negative effects of climate change

entities.name: WOMEN-HEADED FARMING HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Agricultural households where the primary head is a woman

entities.name: ADAPTATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Specific actions or techniques implemented to adapt to climate change

entities.name: FINANCIAL AND RESOURCE LIMITATIONS
entities.description: Lack of money or physical assets that hinder the ability to implement changes

entities.name: LAND CONTROL
entities.description: The power or legal right to manage and make decisions about land use

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL ORGANIZATIONS
entities.description: Institutions providing support, training, and resources to farmers

entities.name: EXTENSION
entities.description: The application of scientific research and new knowledge to agricultural practices through farmer education

entities.name: INFORMATION
entities.description: Knowledge and data required for making informed agricultural decisions

entities.name: TOOLS
entities.description: Physical implements used in farming operations

entities.name: SEED
entities.description: Plant embryos used for sowing and crop production

entities.name: FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Chemical or natural substances added to soil to increase its fertility

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals raised in an agricultural setting

entities.name: DECISION-MAKING
entities.description: The process of selecting a course of action from among multiple alternatives
